problem.title: LiTAMIN2 correspondence sweep on KITTI Odometry 08 (full)
problem.question: Does the seq02 neighbor-voxel correspondence profile transfer to sequence 08 without changing the tuned voxel and iteration profile?

variants.label: Tuned baseline: voxel 1.0 + iter 12
variants.intent: Keep the established LiTAMIN2 no-GT tuned profile as the control.

variants.label: Neighbor voxels: radius 1
variants.intent: Test whether same-voxel correspondence pruning is also limiting seq08.

variants.label: Neighbor voxels: radius 1 + 1.5 m gate
variants.intent: Check whether the seq02 guarded correspondence profile transfers to seq08.

variants.label: Covariance floor: 1e-4
variants.intent: Test whether a weaker voxel covariance eigenvalue floor closes the residual paper gap.

variants.label: Covariance-shape gradient
variants.intent: Test the missing covariance-shape residual derivative in the Gauss-Newton update.

variants.label: Covariance-shape gradient: 0.1x + line search
variants.intent: Test whether a damped covariance-shape update avoids the full-sequence instability of the raw derivative.
